items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Harvey Grant. 12th pick by WAS out of Oklahoma in 88. Developed into nice scoring SF, scoring 18 ppg from 90-93. Traded to POR in 93 & settled into a reserve role thru 99. Horace's twin. Sons Jerami & Jerian also play/played in the NBA.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: The Blazers are acquiring two-time All-Star and former ROY point guard Ja Morant from the Memphis Grizzlies in exchange for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray, per two team sources. @shamsbot.bsky.social was first to report.
items.author: Joe Freeman
items.body_excerpt: The Blazers are acquiring two-time All-Star and former ROY point guard Ja Morant from the Memphis Grizzlies in exchange for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray, per two team sources. @shamsbot.bsky.social was first to report.

items.title: [Haynes] The Portland Trail Blazers envision a starting backcourt of Damian Lillard and Ja Morant alongside Deni Avdija on the wing. A very unconventional move that the franchise believes has upside. Ja Morant gets his fresh start. Jerami Grant and Kris Murray off to Memphis.
